name: senior-fullstack
description: Comprehensive fullstack development skill for building complete web applications with React, Next.js, Node.js, GraphQL, and PostgreSQL. Includes project scaffolding, code quality analysis, architecture patterns, and complete tech stack guidance. Use when building new projects, analyzing code quality, implementing design patterns, or setting up development workflows.
capabilities: Scaffold new fullstack projects with React, Next.js, Node.js, GraphQL, and PostgreSQL
Analyze code quality and generate detailed reports
Apply architecture patterns for scalable web applications
Set up development workflows following best practices
Configure Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines
Implement security best practices for web applications
author: davila7
securitySummary: This skill contains documentation and utility Python scripts for project scaffolding and code quality analysis. All scripts operate locally, read user-specified paths, and generate reports. No network calls, no external command execution, and no credential access. The static scanner flagged 72 false positives, primarily from documentation examples and hash identifiers in JSON metadata.
valueStatement: Building fullstack web applications requires deep knowledge of many technologies and patterns. This skill provides scaffolding tools, code quality analysis, and architecture guidance for React, Next.js, Node.js, GraphQL, and PostgreSQL projects.
limitations: Does not execute code or make network requests to external services
Does not modify files outside the user-specified project directory
Scripts are templates that require custom implementation for full functionality
Does not provide runtime debugging or live application monitoring

useCases.title: Start new projects
useCases.description: Quickly scaffold new fullstack applications with best practice structure and configurations

useCases.title: Enforce standards
useCases.description: Analyze existing codebases and apply architecture patterns for consistent quality

useCases.title: Configure deployments
useCases.description: Set up containerized deployments with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines

promptTemplates.title: Scaffold project
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the senior-fullstack skill to scaffold a new project at /path/to/project with React frontend, Node.js/Express backend, PostgreSQL database, and GraphQL API. Include Docker configuration.

promptTemplates.title: Analyze codebase
promptTemplates.prompt: Run the code quality analyzer on my project at /path/to/project. Show me findings and recommendations for improvement.

promptTemplates.title: Apply patterns
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me implement the repository pattern in my Node.js backend. Show example code structure from the architecture patterns.

promptTemplates.title: Setup CI/CD
promptTemplates.prompt: Set up GitHub Actions workflow for my fullstack project. Include testing, building, and Docker image deployment to container registry.

bestPractices: Use the scaffolder tools to establish consistent project structure across your team
Run code quality analysis before major releases to catch issues early
Follow the architecture patterns documentation for scalable, maintainable code
antiPatterns: Do not skip the architecture review phase when scaling applications
Avoid mixing architectural patterns inconsistently within the same project
Do not rely solely on automated tools without understanding the underlying principles

faq.question: Which frameworks and databases are supported?
faq.answer: Supports React, Next.js, Node.js, Express, GraphQL, REST APIs, PostgreSQL, Prisma, NeonDB, and Supabase.

faq.question: What are the resource limits for generated projects?
faq.answer: The skill does not impose limits. Generated code follows best practices for scalability.

faq.question: Can I integrate with existing codebases?
faq.answer: Yes. The analyzer works on any directory. The scaffolder can add new components to existing projects.

faq.question: Is my code data safe?
faq.answer: Yes. Scripts run locally and only access paths you specify. No code is sent to external services.

faq.question: Why does nothing happen when I run the scripts?
faq.answer: The scripts are scaffold templates with placeholder logic. Use the skill for guidance and implement custom logic as needed.

faq.question: How does this compare to other scaffolding tools?
faq.answer: This skill provides Claude Code integration with comprehensive fullstack patterns. Use alongside create-next-app or similar tools for best results.
